shelves.mapping_rationale: Ambient shelf at all three retailers covers 100% juices, nectars and fruit drinks in Tetra Pak / PET / glass — the primary juice aisle.
Chilled / refrigerated shelf covers fresh-squeezed, cold-pressed and pasteurised-chilled juices — higher fruit content claim, shorter shelf life, premium positioning.
Blended / pureed fruit-forward drinks; classified separately as sub-pool 'smoothie' when fruit puree is first ingredient and texture is opaque.

excluded_shelves.reason: Scope exclusion — not fruit juice or fruit drink by definition.
Scope exclusion — electrolyte/sports drinks are not fruit juice.
Deprioritised — small shelf; if V8 or tomato-juice products appear they are tagged vegetable_juice and excluded from scoring corpus.
Excluded unless significant shelf presence (>5 SKUs) at at least one retailer — flag for Product Agent review.
